title: Rebutia stuemeriana
taxonomy: Rebutia stuemeriana is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It is a member of the subgenus Rebutia, which is part of the genus Rebutia. The genus Rebutia is a group of small to medium-sized cacti, primarily native to South America. Rebutia stuemeriana is classified as a species within this genus due to its unique characteristics and distinct features. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and conservation status.

The health benefits of Rebutia stuemeriana are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body.
